title: taraxacum carinthiacum
intro: Taraxacum carinthiacum, also known as the Alpine dandelion or Carinthian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its roots and leaves containing taraxasterol, a triterpene that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum carinthiacum include its potential to support liver and kidney health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. Taraxacum carinthiacum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
